text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
Curfews are so annoying. Especially before a
race, when I should be speaking more with you.

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text: I may not live in the dorms, but everyone has to be out of the academy when they close the gates...

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
Ah, of course. You can just come over to my
place. No curfews there.

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
It's settled! I'm already excited for the discussions
we'll have—and for the races that await us!
